title: Grid Capacity Map TSO - Production and Consumption (Energinet)
description:
[Publisher: Energinet] **Replacing [GridCapacityMapTSO](https://energidataservice.dk/tso-electricity/GridCapacityMapTSO)** 

The dataset is the monthly dataset that describes the grid capacity at the TSO level, capacity at the general level, and for wind and solar production and consumption units.
Data is related to [www.kapacitetskort.dk](https://storymaps.arcgis.com/stories/eb5b387e376f49b8996d5e7c47fbdd37).

***apc**: available production capacity* \
***acc**: available consumption capacity*\
***cap**: capacity* \
***cons**: consumption* \
***su**: summer* \
***wi**: winter* \
***prod**:  production* \
***lb / ub**: lower / upper bound* \
***with_tso / no_tso**: transformer presence*
